title: Old Fashioned Fun
content:
When that old joke was new,
        It was not hard to joke,
    And puns we now pooh-pooh,
        Great laughter would provoke.

    True wi

title: Sorrows Of Werther, The
content:
Werther had a love for Charlotte
        Such as words could never utter;
    Would you know how first he met her?
        She was cutting brea

title: When Moonlike Ore The Hazure Seas
content:
When moonlike ore the hazure seas
        In soft effulgence swells,
    When silver jews and balmy breaze
        Bend down the Lily's bells;
